name: E-Campus (Study Resource Hub)
description: Full-stack academic platform built with React and Node.js/Express to centralize study materials. Includes REST APIs, user management, and secure content access.

name: Full-Stack Quiz Application
description: Online quiz platform with authentication, quiz management, and automated scoring. Built using React frontend and Node.js/Express backend with MongoDB.

name: Portfolio Website (React + Vite)
description: High-performance portfolio built with React and Vite featuring lazy loading, responsive design, and SEO optimization.

name: Personal Portfolio Website
description: Responsive personal portfolio built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with performance optimization and SEO best practices.

name: Car Scrolling Animation (React)
description: Interactive scroll-based animation built using React functional components with optimized performance and smooth UI transitions.

name: Student Management REST API (Spring Boot)
description: Backend REST API built with Java Spring Boot featuring layered architecture, validation, global exception handling, and H2 database.

name: Nature's Cure
description: Health-focused web application currently under development, aiming to provide user-friendly solutions with modern UI and scalable backend.

name: React Learning Journey
description: Collection of React projects demonstrating hooks, routing, state management, and performance optimization techniques.
